summary: Tested 4 new admin log-style features (Cooked Temp, Delivery Records, Probe Calibration, Legionella). Backend: 18/18 pytest passed (all 4 routers, pass/fail logic, auth gating, filters, deletes). Frontend: login + sidebar links verified, all 4 routes load with correct titles/subtitles, forms open and accept input, mobile viewport (390x844) shows no horizontal overflow on any of the 4 pages. Found minor missing data-testid on form input fields.

ui_bugs.issue: Several form input fields are missing data-testid attributes (e.g., food_item input, temp_c input, supplier input, probe_no input, location_of_test input, hot/cold temp inputs, initials, invoice_number). Only method-select and save-btn have testids. This blocks reliable automated UI test selection.

Multiple 403 console errors observed on mobile-sized navigation runs (likely auth cookie retention edge case with viewport change in same session, did not block page render). Worth investigating but page content rendered correctly (bodyScrollWidth 374-390, no overflow).

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to remaining form input fields across the 4 new pages: cooked-food-input, cooked-temp-input, cooked-initials-input, delivery-supplier-input, delivery-frozen-input, delivery-chilled-input, probe-no-input, probe-cold-input, probe-hot-input, legionella-location-input, legionella-hot-input, legionella-cold-input, plus delete buttons (cooked-delete-{id}, etc.) for full automated coverage.
Investigate intermittent 403s on /api/* during rapid viewport-change navigation (low priority — does not affect end-user flow with stable session).
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 routers correctly exclude MongoDB _id via projection {_id: 0} on list, and pop('_id') on insert response — good.

Pass/fail logic is correctly implemented for all 4 endpoints and verified by tests (cooked >=75; delivery frozen<=-15 AND chilled<=8; probe |cold|<=1 AND |hot-100|<=1; legionella hot>=50 AND cold<=20).
Auth gating verified: list/create require staff+, delete requires admin+. Unauthorized requests correctly return 401/403.
Pydantic input validation in place (min_length, max_length, ge/le on temp_c).
Each router uses a fresh uuid4()[:12] (12-char trimmed UUID). Acceptable but slightly higher collision risk than full UUID; if scale grows, consider full UUID.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (visual + navigation verified; programmatic form-fill blocked by missing testids on input fields)

seed_data_creation: All TEST_ prefixed records created during pytest runs were deleted by the test teardown (verified). UI test attempted to create + delete; deletes via UI confirmed via dialog handler.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_log_forms.py covers all 4 features end-to-end (create/list/delete + pass/fail logic + auth). For UI testing the 4 new pages, note the actual data-testids present: page wrapper (admin-cooked-temp-page etc.), location selector (cooked-location, delivery-location, probe-location, legionella-location), New Entry button (add-cooked-btn, add-delivery-btn, add-probe-btn, add-legionella-btn), method select (cooking-method), save buttons (save-cooked-btn etc.). Other input fields lack testids (selector by placeholder is required). Mobile (390x844) renders correctly. Login route is /admin-login (NOT /admin/login).
